name: stats-graph-fix
description: Redesign the two README stats SVGs: add coverage donut gauge, remove redundant bar chart, downsample timeline, add dual Y-axis for comments visibility.

steps.title: Remove defunct Tieba corpus from payload
steps.change: Delete tieba = CorpusLoader(...) line and its source entry. The Tieba scraper was removed (49 files). The 40-record Tieba corpus inflates source count.

steps.title: Add donut gauge helper method
steps.change: Add _donut_gauge(cx, cy, r, ratio, label, color, sublabel) method using SVG circles with stroke-dasharray. Ratio is 0.0–1.0. Circle rotates -90° so fill starts at top.
steps.verify: Method exists and is callable. Test by generating SVG with ratio=0.891 — should show ~320° arc.

steps.title: Redesign render_summary_svg — coverage-focused dashboard
steps.change: Replace hero-cards + bar-chart with: (a) Donut gauge for coverage ratio at center-left, (b) Two metric tiles (weak terms, evidence deficit) at right, (c) Compact 3-number stat row at bottom. Remove _bar_row calls. Keep same color palette and dimensions.
steps.verify: npm run stats:update then open docs/stats/corpus-keyword-stats.svg — should show donut with 89.10%, 182 weak terms, 351 deficit, and 3 compact counts

steps.title: Add downsample and format-k helpers
steps.change: Add _downsample_points(points, target=50) — take every Nth point, always include last. Add _format_k(value) — format as '0K', '50K', '154K' etc. Add _grid_row_k variant with K-format labels.
steps.verify: Unit test: 456 points → ~50 points, first and last preserved

steps.title: Add dual Y-axis to timeline
steps.change: Add right Y-axis for Comments (0–30K scale) with separate grid lines. Left Y-axis stays for Danmaku (0–200K). Drop Total line (redundant — Danmaku = 86% of Total). Downsample points to ~50. Add axis labels in legend. Use K-format for all axis labels.
steps.verify: npm run stats:update then open docs/stats/corpus-growth-timeline.svg — Comments line should be clearly visible on its own scale, ~50 data points shown

steps.title: Regenerate SVGs and run full test suite
steps.change: npm run stats:update && npm run python:test && npm test
steps.verify: All tests pass. Both SVGs render correctly when viewed. README stats block updated.
